title: ranunculus geraniifolius var. carinthiacus
intro: Ranunculus geraniifolius var. carinthiacus, also known as the Alpine Buttercup, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its extracts have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The Alpine Buttercup can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal and health benefits.
